title: stelis digitata
intro: Stelis digitata, also known as Finger Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis digitata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis digitata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and infections. The herbal preparations of Stelis digitata typically involve drying and crushing the plant's leaves and roots, which can be steeped in hot water to make a tea or used in infusions and tinctures.
